'''Benon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Delantine system/Legends|Delantine system]]. It was the closest planet to [[Delantine]] itself. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] were supposed to think [[Trux Zissu]] fled to Benon after abandoning the ''[[Timespan]]''.<ref name="Emergency in Escape Pod Four" />

{{Planet-stub}}
